DefinitionDescription: This term is intended to collate similar measurements for the LOINC SNOMED CT Collaboration in an ontological view. Additionally, it can be used to communicate a laboratory order, either alone or in combination with specimen or other information in the order. It may NOT be used to report back the measured patient value. [https://lo.inc/ce2mb6]

DefinitionDescription: The test in performed in patients who do not have a clinical response to recombinant erythropoietin (EPO) therapy in order to determine whether they have antibodies to the drug. EPO is used for patients with a variety of disorders, including advanced kidney disease, to raise their hemoglobin level. For patients with EPO antibodies, other therapeutic options are available.
